title: NovaMind Bridge Protocol
description: Standardized schema for all WebSocket IPC between Python Ecosystem and Godot Client

protocol_version.description: The protocol version to ensure compatibility.

message_type.description: The transport layer category of the message.

payload.description: Arbitrary data associated with the action.

timestamp.description: Float timestamp of when the message was dispatched.

msg_id.description: UUID string for message tracing and idempotency.

correlation_id.description: UUID string tying a sequence of distributed events together.
